name: agentglass
description: 🛰 agentglass — a loupe for your agents. Real-time mission-control dashboard for AI coding agents (Claude Code hooks + any OpenTelemetry GenAI exporter). This package is the quickstart launcher; the app lives at github.com/SirAllap/agentglass.
author: David Pallares (https://github.com/SirAllap)
